title: German Fried Rice
description: A classic German-inspired dish made with fried rice and various toppings.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced ham and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add diced onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture, about 5 minutes.
Push the vegetables to one side of the pan.
Crack the egg into the other side of the pan and scramble it until cooked through.
Mix the egg with the vegetables.
Add the fried rice to the pan, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice mixture for about 5 minutes, until heated through.
Season with salt, pepper, and German seasoning.
Transfer the rice mixture to a serving platter.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
